grounding_prompt: <image><image><image> The Chef <bbox>[0.406,0.431,0.62,0.922]</bbox> from image3 stands outside a stone building with a window box filled with flowers <bbox>[0.003,0.003,0.447,0.973]</bbox> from image1, their vibrant petals glowing under the golden hues of the late afternoon sun, as a serene bamboo forest <bbox>[0.749,0.001,0.998,0.776]</bbox> from image2 sways gently in the breeze behind them.

<image><image><image> The hotel complex <bbox>[0.145,0.314,0.475,0.45]</bbox> from image1 glows under the golden hues of a sunset, its sprawling courtyards reflecting in a nearby shimmering lagoon where a seal <bbox>[0.218,0.674,0.433,0.823]</bbox> from image3 playfully splashes, while a peach character <bbox>[0.625,0.484,0.896,0.777]</bbox> from image2, with a soft, cartoonish face, sits on the edge of a pool, dangling its legs and waving at the seal.

<image><image><image> The glowing pear <bbox>[0.311,0.482,0.452,0.723]</bbox> from image1 rests on a wooden picnic table under the soft light of a crescent moon, its eerie luminescence casting faint shadows on the grass, while a nearby hot air balloon <bbox>[0.681,0.093,0.905,0.74]</bbox> from image2 drifts silently above, tethered to the ground by a rope tied around a tissue box <bbox>[0.545,0.553,0.715,0.713]</bbox> from image3 that flutters slightly in the cool night breeze.

<image><image><image> The giraffe <bbox>[0.21,0.134,0.54,0.991]</bbox> from image1 stands calmly under the neon glow of a futuristic city at night, its elongated neck reaching toward a transparent, oval-shaped object <bbox>[0.483,0.273,0.651,0.73]</bbox> from image3 suspended mid-air, while a person running on a futuristic treadmill <bbox>[0.629,0.58,0.91,0.931]</bbox> from image2 nearby casts rhythmic shadows onto the metallic ground beneath the pulsing, holographic lights.

<image><image><image> The brass trumpet <bbox>[0.078,0.43,0.83,0.661]</bbox> from image1 rests against a weathered wooden table under the soft glow of a white ceramic lamp <bbox>[0.273,0.136,0.675,0.515]</bbox> from image2, its light casting warm reflections onto the instrument's golden surface, while a vintage pocket watch <bbox>[0.78,0.555,0.997,0.76]</bbox> from image3 lies open beside it, its intricate gears glinting faintly in the dimly lit study at dusk.

<image><image><image> The pigeon <bbox>[0.193,0.452,0.511,0.782]</bbox> from image1 pecks curiously at a soccer ball <bbox>[0.473,0.507,0.655,0.779]</bbox> from image2 on a cobblestone path, illuminated by the soft golden glow of a late afternoon sun, while a piece of broccoli <bbox>[0.699,0.495,0.915,0.786]</bbox> from image3 sits nearby, its vibrant green contrasting against the muted gray stones.

<image><image><image> Under the glowing neon haze of a futuristic city at dusk, the robotic dinosaur <bbox>[0.056,0.291,0.932,0.779]</bbox> from image3 towers over a cracked asphalt street, its metallic claws delicately gripping a pink highlighter <bbox>[0.473,0.728,0.77,0.859]</bbox> from image2. A futuristic drone <bbox>[0.068,0.096,0.46,0.271]</bbox> from image1 buzzes in synchronized loops above, scanning the scene with pulsating blue lights that reflect off the dinosaur's sleek, chrome armor.

<image><image><image> Under a golden sunrise, hot air balloons <bbox>[0.153,0.188,0.244,0.375]</bbox> from image1 drift serenely above a sprawling meadow, their vibrant colors mirrored in the dewdrops on the grass. A butterfly <bbox>[0.408,0.688,0.466,0.772]</bbox> from image2 flutters gracefully near a picnic basket, drawn to the sugary scent of a delicious bite egg tart <bbox>[0.438,0.773,0.527,0.867]</bbox> from image3 resting atop a gingham cloth.

<image><image><image> The brass tuba <bbox>[0.412,0.143,0.624,0.846]</bbox> from image1 leans against a weathered wooden bench in a sunlit garden, its gleaming surface reflecting the warm afternoon glow, while the copper-colored watering can with floral designs <bbox>[0.596,0.591,0.809,0.87]</bbox> from image2 sits nearby, a few droplets of water trickling from its spout as a pair of pliers <bbox>[0.477,0.835,0.632,0.909]</bbox> from image3, left haphazardly on the grass, catches the light.

<image><image><image> The red motorcycle <bbox>[0.062,0.513,0.678,0.833]</bbox> from image1 rests beside a vintage suitcase <bbox>[0.597,0.724,0.948,0.907]</bbox> from image2 on a cobblestone dock, its glossy paint catching the golden hues of the late afternoon sun, while a sailboat <bbox>[0.599,0.4,0.795,0.535]</bbox> from image3 glides serenely in the shimmering waters just beyond.

<image><image><image> A camera on a wooden tripod <bbox>[0.521,0.402,0.752,0.931]</bbox> from image1 is set up near the edge of a serene lake at sunrise, its lens focused on a Canada goose <bbox>[0.338,0.575,0.432,0.691]</bbox> from image2 gliding gracefully across the golden-hued water, while a woman <bbox>[0.633,0.212,0.943,0.909]</bbox> from image3 in a wide-brimmed hat adjusts the camera settings, her fingers delicately turning the dials.

<image><image><image> The baby <bbox>[0.254,0.274,0.514,0.789]</bbox> from image1 sits on a soft, cream-colored rug in a warmly lit nursery at dusk, reaching toward Superman-themed slippers <bbox>[0.483,0.71,0.563,0.812]</bbox> from image2 that peek out from an open wooden drawer <bbox>[0.608,0.557,0.855,0.773]</bbox> from image3, their vibrant red and blue colors glowing faintly under the golden light from a nearby lamp.

<image><image><image> A festive dining table <bbox>[0.273,0.733,0.74,0.968]</bbox> from image1, adorned with flickering candles and vibrant dishes, sits under the stars beside a glowing orange tent <bbox>[0.044,0.548,0.471,0.811]</bbox> from image3, its soft light spilling onto the grass where a curious cow <bbox>[0.54,0.383,0.959,0.842]</bbox> from image2 stands nearby, gently nudging a fallen napkin with its nose.

<image><image><image> The teapot <bbox>[0.639,0.488,0.825,0.765]</bbox> from image1 sits steaming on a rustic wooden table bathed in the warm glow of late afternoon sunlight, while the red apple <bbox>[0.78,0.536,0.932,0.794]</bbox> from image2 leans against the base of the beige ceramic pitcher <bbox>[0.213,0.472,0.571,0.785]</bbox> from image3, its glossy skin reflecting the soft amber hues of the room.

<image><image><image> Snowdrops <bbox>[0.144,0.471,0.391,0.717]</bbox> from image1 bloom delicately in a frost-kissed meadow under the soft, golden light of an early morning sun, their petals brushing against a white frisbee <bbox>[0.502,0.523,0.658,0.777]</bbox> from image2 half-buried in the glistening snow beside a vintage camera <bbox>[0.702,0.291,0.84,0.467]</bbox> from image3 resting on a weathered wooden stump.

<image><image><image> The hot air balloons <bbox>[0.438,0.107,0.598,0.445]</bbox> from image1 drift lazily across a golden sunrise sky, their vibrant colors reflecting in the still waters of a lake where a duck <bbox>[0.4,0.64,0.672,0.794]</bbox> from image2 floats nearby, pecking at a piece of bread with sesame seeds <bbox>[0.631,0.725,0.729,0.804]</bbox> from image3 bobbing on the surface.

<image><image><image> The woman with tattoos on her arms and chest <bbox>[0.403,0.335,0.994,0.823]</bbox> from image2 sits at a rustic wooden table under the warm glow of hanging Edison bulbs at dusk, reaching for French fries <bbox>[0.567,0.787,0.956,0.901]</bbox> from image3 next to a pot with a lid <bbox>[0.006,0.603,0.453,0.772]</bbox> from image1 that emits a thin wisp of steam.

<image><image><image> The cat house <bbox>[0.069,0.278,0.512,0.878]</bbox> from image1 sits in the corner of a cozy kitchen bathed in warm, late-afternoon sunlight, while a teapot on a stove <bbox>[0.686,0.446,0.773,0.535]</bbox> from image2 gently steams nearby; on the wooden palette with paint <bbox>[0.715,0.569,0.946,0.631]</bbox> from image3 resting on the counter, vibrant colors glisten under the golden light, as if waiting for an artist's touch.

<image><image><image> A rabbit <bbox>[0.243,0.121,0.526,0.638]</bbox> from image1 perches on the brown leather suitcase <bbox>[0.165,0.586,0.539,0.866]</bbox> from image3 under the soft glow of a golden sunset, its nose twitching as it eyes the three-layer cake <bbox>[0.583,0.643,0.757,0.855]</bbox> from image2 nearby, the delicate frosting glistening in the warm evening light of a grassy meadow.

<image><image><image> In a dimly lit bathroom at twilight, a white dress shirt <bbox>[0.231,0.121,0.438,0.725]</bbox> from image2 hangs neatly on a hook near a red leather wallet case <bbox>[0.551,0.784,0.776,0.957]</bbox> from image1 resting on the tiled floor, while a floating toilet <bbox>[0.514,0.378,0.669,0.776]</bbox> from image3 hovers eerily above, casting faint shadows on the walls.

<image><image><image> The snowboard <bbox>[0.062,0.184,0.365,0.806]</bbox> from image1 leans upright against a rustic wooden cabin wall as steam rises from a vintage copper teapot <bbox>[0.62,0.395,0.862,0.58]</bbox> from image2 resting on a nearby snow-dusted table, with a white rectangular device <bbox>[0.444,0.735,0.55,0.847]</bbox> from image3 glowing faintly in the twilight, casting a soft reflection on the icy surface.

<image><image><image> The brown horse <bbox>[0.349,0.082,0.642,0.825]</bbox> from image3 stands under the golden light of a late afternoon sun on a rocky trail, its reins tied loosely to a post as a pair of dusty hiking boots <bbox>[0.209,0.725,0.284,0.858]</bbox> from image2 rest nearby, while a futuristic dumbbell <bbox>[0.521,0.715,0.77,0.902]</bbox> from image1 gleams on the ground, its sleek metallic surface reflecting the vibrant hues of the surrounding forest.

<image><image><image> The delicious bite tart <bbox>[0.436,0.473,0.645,0.602]</bbox> from image1 rests atop a wooden picnic table under the warm glow of a golden sunset, while a blue shovel <bbox>[0.247,0.831,0.401,0.989]</bbox> from image2 leans against the table's leg, and a crane <bbox>[0.383,0.077,0.623,0.373]</bbox> from image3 in the distance glides gracefully across the sky, silhouetted against the fading orange and pink hues.

<image><image><image> The young girl <bbox>[0.44,0.28,0.686,0.791]</bbox> from image2 crouches on a dimly lit bathroom floor at dusk, her hands tangled in toilet paper <bbox>[0.206,0.37,0.24,0.417]</bbox> from image1 unraveling from the roll, while a gray sneaker with a glowing sole <bbox>[0.167,0.7,0.308,0.833]</bbox> from image3 sits abandoned near the doorway, casting faint neon light onto the tiled surface.

<image><image><image> The red train <bbox>[0.221,0.378,0.655,0.694]</bbox> from image1 glides through the golden hues of a late afternoon, its reflection shimmering on the nearby river, while a balcony with a wrought iron railing and green plants growing on it <bbox>[0.631,0.004,0.992,0.361]</bbox> from image2 overlooks the tracks, and a bicycle <bbox>[0.762,0.511,0.945,0.92]</bbox> from image3 leans casually against the stone wall beneath the balcony.

<image><image><image> The spherical, woven lamp <bbox>[0.723,0.314,0.919,0.606]</bbox> from image1 casts a warm amber glow over a dimly lit living room at dusk, its light reflecting off a snow globe <bbox>[0.169,0.393,0.278,0.549]</bbox> from image3 perched on a nearby shelf, while a black baby stroller <bbox>[0.247,0.259,0.574,0.906]</bbox> from image2, slightly dusted with snow, rests in the corner by the door.

<image><image><image> The vintage copper watering can <bbox>[0.002,0.497,0.405,0.736]</bbox> from image1 rests on a mossy wooden shelf under the warm glow of a flickering antique lantern, while the white fish with a yellowish hue <bbox>[0.401,0.582,0.662,0.688]</bbox> from image2 swims serenely in a clear glass bowl beside it, its reflection glinting faintly; nearby, a red fire extinguisher <bbox>[0.65,0.327,0.922,0.711]</bbox> from image3 leans against the brick wall, its metallic surface catching the dim orange light.

<image><image><image> At sunset, A baby <bbox>[0.368,0.298,0.741,0.873]</bbox> from image2 sits in a sunflower field, their tiny hands curiously reaching for a vintage lighter <bbox>[0.225,0.73,0.394,0.87]</bbox> from image1 lying nearby, its brass surface glinting warmly under the golden hues of the fading sunlight.
